_instructions: PRICES come AUTOMATICALLY from MQBridge.cs in NT8 — do not enter them here.
You only need to fill in the REGIME INTERPRETATION below — 4-5 text fields.
Takes 60 seconds. Do this once per morning from the MenthorQ dashboard.
GEX regime:      negative net GEX = NEGATIVE (red), positive = POSITIVE (green)
dex:             Dealer EXposure bias — POSITIVE or NEGATIVE
vanna:           BULLISH or BEARISH (rising VIX dealer hedge direction)
charm:           BULLISH or BEARISH (time decay hedge direction)
cta_positioning: BUYING or SELLING (systematic fund flow)
direction_bias:  your overall read — LONG, SHORT, or NEUTRAL
strategy_type:   MOMENTUM (neg gamma) | MEAN_REVERSION (pos gamma) | BALANCED
